channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Major League Baseball fires ump amid gambling probe
item.description: Umpire Pat Hoberg was fired after it was revealed he shared betting accounts with a friend who bet on baseball.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Modi's ruling party looks to topple corruption crusader in Delhi poll with graft allegations
item.description: NEW DELHI (AP) — The resurgent Hindu nationalist party of India's Prime Minister Narendra Modi is eyeing a state legislature election in Delhi where it is looking to unseat the governing movement which has led the Indian capital for over a decade but has recently been embroiled in graft allegations.
item.dc:creator: ASHOK SHARMA and SHEIKH SAALIQ, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: The man charged with stabbing Salman Rushdie will soon go on trial. The author will take the stand
item.description: MAYVILLE, N.Y. (AP) — In 2022, Salman Rushdie was about to deliver a lecture before a live audience in western New York when a man ran towards him and plunged a knife into the author’s hand as he raised it in self-defense.
item.dc:creator: CAROLYN THOMPSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: A Russia-like crackdown has jailed dozens in Georgia, with human rights groups sounding the alarm
item.description: TBILISI, Georgia (AP) — Jailed journalist Mzia Amaghlobeli gets weaker every day as her hunger strike has reached three weeks in Rustavi, a town near the Georgian capital of Tbilisi, her lawyer says.
item.dc:creator: SOPHIKO MEGRELIDZE and DASHA LITVINOVA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Trump’s foreign aid freeze could prove to be a boon for the world’s authoritarian strongmen
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — When President Donald Trump froze foreign assistance for 90 days, he argued that such a drastic step was needed to eliminate waste and block what he derides as “woke” spending that doesn’t align with American interests.
item.dc:creator: JOSHUA GOODMAN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Trayon White channels Marion Barry as he fights corruption charges and expulsion from the DC Council
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Trayon White came up in local politics as a direct protege of iconic and infamous former Mayor Marion Barry. Now the D.C.
item.dc:creator: ASHRAF KHALIL, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Paradox Museum Miami takes guests through a 21st century funhouse of mind-boggling illusions
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Art gallery, science exhibition and 21st century funhouse, Paradox Museum Miami takes guests on a tour through optical illusions and other enigmas geared for the age of Instagram.
item.dc:creator: DAVID FISCHER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Trump agrees to pause tariffs on Canada and Mexico after they pledge to boost border enforcement
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump on Monday agreed to a 30-day pause on his tariff threats against Mexico and Canada as America's two largest trading partners took steps to appease his concerns about border security and drug trafficking.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, ROB GILLIES and FABIOLA SÁNCHEZ, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Hero 'band dads' take down elderly active shooter at Texas high school
item.description: An elderly man who opened fire at a high school band competition in Texas was apprehended by four tactically trained dads who deescalated the situation.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump administration ends temporary deportation protection for 350,000 Venezuelans
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump's administration is ending protections that shielded roughly 350,000 Venezuelans from deportation, leaving them with two months before they lose their right to work in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: REBECCA SANTANA and GISELA SALOMON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Man allegedly in country illegally accused of murdering elderly partner: police
item.description: Police in San Antonio have arrested a man who they say was in the country illegally and wanted in connection to the murder of his elderly partner.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Beloved park volunteer found dead after hike in Great Smoky Mountains
item.description: A hiker, who had been reported as missing, was found dead in the Great Smoky Mountains National Park on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Matt Hollingsworth, KREX 5

item.title: Transportation secretary says 'expansive' impact zone was left by Philadelphia medical plane crash
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — The impact area where a medical transportation plane crashed in Philadelphia was notably “expansive,” U.S. Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy said Monday after viewing the site with investigators and city officials. Duffy said he was struck by “how expansive it was.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: What is known about the deadly collision between a passenger jet and Army helicopter
item.description: American Airlines Flight 5342 and an Army helicopter collided in midair near Washington D.C.'s Reagan National Wednesday night, sending the two aircraft into the Potomac River and killing all 67 aboard in the deadliest U.S. air disaster since 2001.
item.dc:creator: JOHN RABY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Democrat places blanket hold on Trump’s State Department picks over targeting of USAID
item.description: Sen. Brian Schatz (D-Hawaii), a member of the Senate Foreign Relations Committee, announced Monday he will place a blanket hold on all of President Trump’s nominees to the State Department until the president backs off his effort to shut down USAID, the nation’s chief foreign assistance agency.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Officer shoots suspect carrying rifle toward Memphis elementary school
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. -- A man is in critical condition after an officer-involved shooting near an elementary school in the Vollintine-Evergreen area Monday morning. At around 10:45 a.m.
item.dc:creator: Megan Fayard, NewsNation

item.title: Who gets more disaster aid? Republican states. Here's the breakdown
item.description: Experts say every state gets millions in federal help — and a little more goes to Republican states and congressional districts.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Missouri restaurant says ICE arrested some employees at work
item.description: "I grew up, like, just right down the road from here. I always come to eat maybe once or twice a week at least," customer Autmn Emery said.
item.dc:creator: Chad Mira, NewsNation

item.title: Lindsey Vonn faces more criticism for competing at age 40 than Tom Brady, Lewis Hamilton
item.description: Why did Lindsey Vonn face so much second guessing in Europe about her comeback at age 40 this season after spending the same time away from the sport as Hirscher?
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DAMPF, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Dozens of Education Department staffers on leave amid Trump's DEI purge
item.description: Dozens of employees with the Department of Education were placed on administrative leave on Friday, allegedly after attending a diversity training course encouraged by then-Secretary Betsy DeVos during the first Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, WGN 9

item.title: Trump warns 'abusive' countries with midnight tariff deadline and more top headlines
item.description: Get all the stories you need-to-know from the most powerful name in news delivered first thing every morning to your inbox.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Preliminary DC plane crash flight data shows conflicting altitude readings: investigators
item.description: Preliminary flight data from the deadly plane crash near Reagan National Airport in Washington, D.C., shows conflicting readings about the altitudes of a passenger jet and Army helicopter that collided, investigators said.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump kept his tariffs pledge. Is he ready for the fallout? Are Americans? What to know
item.description: The Budget Lab at Yale University estimates Trump’s tariffs would cost the average American household $1,000 to $1,200 in annual purchasing power.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Arkansas nurse charged with using dead patient's name in attempt to purchase hundreds of oxycodone pills
item.description: A nurse in Arkansas is facing felony charges after investigators say she used a dead man's name when attempting to purchase oxycodone pills at pharmacies.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: China to file lawsuit with WTO, vows 'countermeasures' in response to Trump tariffs
item.description: In a statement, the ministry’s spokesperson vowed further “countermeasures” against the United States but did not specify what steps it would take.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, WFLA, NBC

item.title: What to know about Trump’s tariffs targeting Canada, Mexico and China
item.description: President Donald Trump has taken executive action to impose or threaten new tariffs on imports from Canada, Mexico and China.
item.dc:creator: Bill Barrow, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: How to save money on your taxes
item.description: You may qualify for tax credits for caring for a child or dependent or investing in clean energy for your home.
item.dc:creator: Steph Whiteside, Fox 5

item.title: Airport employee injured in collision with aircraft wing at Chicago's O'Hare
item.description: The driver of a tug vehicle at Chicago O'Hare International Airport was injured Saturday evening after colliding with the wing of an airplane.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, Fox 5

item.title: Will La Niña be a 'bust' this winter? Meteorologist explains why it may feel like it
item.description: After months of teasing, a La Niña winter has finally started – but we don't blame you if you haven't noticed.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, Fox 5

item.title: Trump puts tariffs on Canada, Mexico and China, spurring trade war as North American allies respond
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump on Saturday signed an order to impose stiff tariffs on imports from Mexico, Canada and China, drawing swift retaliation and an undeniable sense of betrayal from the country's North American neighbors as a trade war erupted among the longtime allies.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, ZEKE MILLER, ROB GILLIES and CHRISTOPHER SHERMAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump follows through on long-standing pledge, signs tariffs on Canada, Mexico and China
item.description: "Tariffs on imports from Canada, Mexico, and China are SIGNED!" White House spokesperson Harrison Fields posted on the social media platform X.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, WGN 9

item.title: Data from the deadliest U.S. air accident in a generation show conflicting altitude readings
item.description: Recovery crews and divers searched the Potomac River for remains and cleared wreckage Saturday from the midair collision of a passenger jet and Army helicopter that killed 67 people.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Seven dead, 19 injured in 'high-impact' air ambulance crash in Philadelphia
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — A person in a car was the seventh fatal victim of the fiery crash of an air ambulance onto a busy Philadelphia street, authorities said Saturday, as investigators sifted through burned cars, damaged homes and charred debris for clues to determine why the aircraft plummeted shortl
item.dc:creator: MATT ROURKE and MARC LEVY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: CBS agrees to hand over '60 Minutes' Harris interview transcripts to FCC
item.description: CBS says it will turn over an unedited transcript of its October interview with Kamala Harris to the Federal Communications Commission, part of President Donald Trump's ongoing fight with the network over how it handled a story about his opponent.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BAUDER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump says he ordered precision military strike against senior ISIS planner
item.description: President Trump said he ordered precision air strikes on Saturday morning targeting a "senior ISIS Attack planner" and others the unnamed individual recruited and led in Somalia.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5

item.title: Medical plane carrying pediatric patient crashes in Philadelphia, sets homes ablaze
item.description: A medical transport jet headed for Missouri and carrying two people and four crew members crashed in Northeast Philadelphia Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, Fox 5

item.title: Big Oil wants a lot from Trump. It has an ally in Doug Burgum, the president's Interior pick
item.description: BISMARCK, N.D. (AP) — When North Dakota's petroleum association was going to hold a banquet honoring top fracking executives last year, it turned to Gov. Doug Burgum.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN SLODYSKO and JACK DURA, Associated Press, ABC 4
